output.summary: Fixed layout shift bug caused by Gutenberg's ::after pseudo-element displaying as block on non-tall cards. Added after:!hidden to hide ::after by default, with md:after:!block on tall TextCards to override and show the split background.

filesModified.change: Added after:!hidden to base classes (line 54), added md:after:!block to isTall condition (line 58)
filesModified.reason: Hide Gutenberg's ::after on non-tall cards to prevent layout shifts. Show ::after on tall cards for split background effect.
Hide Gutenberg's ::after on all ImageCards since they never use it for anything.

bugDescription.issue: Gutenberg injects ::after pseudo-element with display: block on focused blocks, causing layout shifts
bugDescription.symptom: Extra space or visible element where ::after renders as display: block
bugDescription.rootCause: Gutenberg's focus outline uses ::after, which defaults to display: block. On elements that don't actually use ::after for content, this creates unwanted layout shifts.

baseClasses.purpose: Hide Gutenberg's ::after by default to prevent layout shifts on non-tall cards

tallCardOverride.generates: display: block !important on ::after at md: breakpoint
tallCardOverride.purpose: Override the base after:!hidden on tall cards to show the ::after element used for split background bottom half
tallCardOverride.cascadeOrder: md:after:!block comes after after:!hidden in the className, so at md: breakpoint it overrides the hidden state

baseClasses.purpose: Hide Gutenberg's ::after on all ImageCards since they never use it
baseClasses.unconditional: No override needed - ImageCards never use ::after for anything

textCardNonTall.breakpoints: Hidden at all breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop)

textCardTall.resultMobile: ::after is hidden on mobile/tablet (split background not shown on small screens)
textCardTall.resultDesktop: md:after:!block overrides after:!hidden at md: breakpoint, ::after becomes visible for split background
textCardTall.visualEffect: Split background appears only on desktop as intended

imageCard.result: ::after is hidden on all ImageCards at all breakpoints
imageCard.note: ImageCards never use ::after, so it stays hidden unconditionally

cssSpecificity.cascadeOrder: Both use !important, but the media query override comes later in the cascade and applies at md: breakpoint, winning over the base hidden state on tall cards at desktop width

warnings: Webpack performance warnings (asset size limits) - pre-existing, not related to changes
buildStatus.details: Build completed successfully with 'webpack compiled with 3 warnings'. All warnings are pre-existing performance recommendations. TypeScript compilation passed without errors.

syncStatus.details: PHP templates intentionally left unchanged. This is editor-only styling to hide Gutenberg's injected ::after pseudo-element. The frontend does not inject ::after, so no PHP changes are needed.

before.nonTallCards: Gutenberg's ::after displays as block, causing layout shifts or visible unwanted space
before.tallCardsDesktop: ::after correctly shows split background (this was working)
before.tallCardsMobile: ::after might have shown when it shouldn't (split background should only appear on desktop)

after.nonTallCards: ::after is hidden (display: none), no layout shifts
after.tallCardsDesktop: ::after shows split background (md:after:!block overrides after:!hidden at desktop width)
after.tallCardsMobile: ::after is hidden (split background correctly hidden on mobile/tablet)

editorTesting: Open Gutenberg editor and add non-tall TextCards and ImageCards
Verify no layout shifts or extra space from ::after element
Add tall TextCards and verify split background appears correctly on desktop
Toggle between tall and non-tall on TextCards, verify ::after shows/hides appropriately
responsiveTesting: Test tall TextCards at mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints
Verify ::after (split background) is hidden on mobile/tablet
Verify ::after (split background) shows on desktop (md: breakpoint)
Verify non-tall cards have hidden ::after at all breakpoints
cssInspection: Inspect non-tall TextCard and ImageCard ::after in browser dev tools
Verify computed style shows display: none
Inspect tall TextCard ::after at desktop width
Verify computed style shows display: block at md: breakpoint
